markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Streamline the content review process and align on new content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Review Process:** Emily is the primary content reviewer. For threat intel topics, she will route content to Callie to ensure technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**New Infographics:** Approved the use of AI-generated infographics (2 per post) to improve visual engagement. Abdallah will take responsibility for any internal brand pushback.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Webinar Repurposing:** Approved creating 3-part blog series from webinar transcripts to drive traffic back to recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Competitor Content Blocked:** All competitor comparison topics are on hold pending a legal review, a necessary precaution due to a history of litigation from Proofpoint.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [**Primary Reviewer:** Emily will now review all content.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Threat Intel Exception:** For topics requiring deep technical accuracy (e.g., specific attack groups), Emily will route the content to Callie.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Airtable Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**Approval:** Emily moves topics from "Ideas for Approval" to "Approved by Abnormal."](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Emily can add comments directly in Airtable cells or request a dedicated feedback column.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [**Webinar Content:** Found by filtering the "Assignments" tab by `Content Type: Webinar workflow`.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [**AI-Generated Infographics:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Decision:** Approved adding 2 infographics per post to improve visual engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Abdallah will take responsibility for any internal brand pushback, framing it as a "Web 3.0" experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
          - [**Sourcing:** Stats will be referenced in the text and linked to the source.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
          - [**Accessibility:** All infographics will include alt text for SEO and accessibility.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Webinar Repurposing:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Decision:** Approved creating 3-part blog series from webinar transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Drives traffic back to the full webinar recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Future Enhancement:** May add video snippets or Wistia iframes in a later refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Content Strategy & Deprioritization

  - [**Microsoft Keywords:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [**Decision:** Deprioritize Microsoft keywords for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High competition from Microsoft's own site makes ranking difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
      - [**Action:** Use Microsoft-focused content for ad-hoc sales campaigns, not scaled SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [**Competitor Comparison Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [**Decision:** Blocked all competitor comparison topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A necessary precaution due to a history of litigation from Proofpoint.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)
      - [**Path Forward:** Emily and Meaghan will discuss a legal-approved strategy in their Tuesday meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
      - [Review all content in the "Ideas for Approval" Airtable view by mid-next week (by Wednesday).](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
      - [Coordinate with Callie to review the queue of rewritten articles that were previously disabled.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2205.0)
  - [**Emily & Meaghan:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
      - [Discuss a legal-approved strategy for competitor comparison content in their Tuesday meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [**Abdallah:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [Share the webinar blog series initiative with Sabrina (content manager) to ensure buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [Create a dedicated Airtable view for webinar-related content.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [Add a feedback/comment column to the "Ideas for Approval" view.](https://fathom.video/share/y6nsUN17DQxsxzRxYJBy1yHyx1Rq3p9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
